title: Hint
text: A 4% $$p-value$$ cutoff means that the total probability outside the acceptance region is 4%. If this is the total probability outside the acceptance region, how much is in the left tail?

title: Hint
text: the total probability outside the acceptance region in the left-tail is 2%
